intent: Takes a landed change from merge to verified-in-production, hard-gating every irreversible step, verifying a real health signal, and keeping rollback first-class.

dimensions.name: hard-gate-irreversible
dimensions.criterion: Every irreversible step (merge, production deploy, escalation trigger) is a hard gate.

dimensions.name: verify-health
dimensions.criterion: Verifies a real health signal after deploying, not just that the command ran.

dimensions.name: rollback-first-class
dimensions.criterion: Rollback is a first-class path, ready before the deploy.

dimensions.name: reads-context
dimensions.criterion: Reads deploy commands and triggers from the product context, not hardcoded.
